description_long: This rifle features a sleek, modern design with a predominantly dark blue and black color scheme. It has a bullpup configuration, with the magazine and action located behind the trigger, resulting in a compact overall length. The rifle is equipped with a scope mounted on the top rail for precision aiming, and the barrel is long and slender, extending well beyond the handguard. The stock is integrated into the body, providing a solid and ergonomic shoulder rest, while the pistol grip is pronounced and textured for secure handling. The magazine appears to be a detachable box type, and the overall construction suggests a mix of metal and polymer materials for durability and reduced weight.
description: A modern, dark blue and black bullpup rifle with a scope, long barrel, and integrated stock, featuring a detachable box magazine and ergonomic grip.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, including the scope, long barrel, integrated stock, and magazine.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the narrow barrel and scope alignment, with minimal width visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, showing the scope, barrel, and stock from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the stock and the back of the scope, with the barrel receding into the distance.
